text.title: Ollama Production Deployment — Procedure
text.summary: Five ordered steps. Each lists input, action, output, and a decision-gate. Skip a step only if the gate explicitly allows.

list.item: Step 1 — gather-inputs. Input: task brief. Action: confirm Prerequisites are satisfied. Output: input bundle. Decision-gate: all Applies-If hold → proceed; any Skip-If holds → exit with skip note.

Step 2 — apply-rules. Input: bundle from step 1. Action: walk each rule in `content/01-core-rules.xml` in order; record pass/fail. Output: rule-walk table. Decision-gate: all five rules pass → proceed; any fails → repair before continuing.

Step 3 — produce-artefact. Input: rule-walk. Action: emit the `config` artefact following the schema in `content/02-output-contract.xml`. Output: draft artefact. Decision-gate: structural validation passes locally.

Step 4 — validate. Input: draft artefact. Action: run `scripts/validate-ollama-deployment.py`; if it exits non-zero, fix the violation list and re-run. Output: validated artefact. Decision-gate: validator exit 0.

Step 5 — hand-off. Input: validated artefact. Action: persist with `signature = sha1(slug+version+date)[:16]` and link from the upstream task. Output: artefact + signature. Decision-gate: signature present and recorded.
